description_long: This stereo sound system features a tall, rectangular cabinet with a slightly slanted top and a matte black finish. The front face displays two large, circular speaker cones arranged vertically, each set into a recessed area, giving the unit a bold and powerful appearance. The sides and back are solid and unadorned, emphasizing the monolithic, modern design. The surface appears to be constructed from dense, likely wooden or composite panels, with a subtle texture visible in the finish. There are no visible control panels, ports, or branding on any side, suggesting a minimalist aesthetic. The overall build suggests durability and suitability for placement in urban environments such as parks, garages, or public gathering spaces.
description: A tall, matte black stereo sound system with two prominent circular speaker cones on the front and a minimalist, monolithic design. The sides and back are plain, with no visible controls or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large, circular speaker cones set vertically in a matte black cabinet.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the solid, unadorned surface and the slight backward slant of the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, featureless back panel with a consistent matte finish.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with a solid, angled surface and no visible features.
